hero_subtitle: SFTY connects Travel Rule messaging, exception handling, and customer data into one compliance workflow that preserves traceable evidence for reporting and review.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_description: Travel Rule data often stays separate from broader compliance and case management workflows, delaying review and audit readiness. This separation makes it difficult for VASPs to link message routing, exceptions, and customer data into a clear, defensible compliance report.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links Travel Rule messages, routing status, exceptions and customer data into structured cases with audit-ready evidence supporting compliance teams’ reporting and review workflows.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to evidence
workflow_description: SFTY links Travel Rule messages, exceptions and routing data through case creation, evidence preservation and reporting for comprehensive compliance review and audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another Travel Rule tool. The evidence control layer

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support Travel Rule audit evidence and reporting
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Show how Travel Rule exceptions are routed and managed
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Explain how audit trails preserve Travel Rule case evidence
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how Travel Rule data integrates with compliance workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, customer data, routing status and exceptions into one structured compliance workflow tailored for VASPs to support regulated Travel Rule operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes and manages exceptions by creating cases for incomplete or high-risk events, enabling compliance teams to review and resolve Travel Rule anomalies within one workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case evidence and message histories related to Travel Rule events to support audit-ready compliance reviews and traceability.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into a single operating layer without disrupting existing provider relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers or tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above Travel Rule providers, connecting and structuring their outputs rather than replacing them, to deliver consistent workflows and reporting.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule data into audit-ready evidence
final_description: Review how SFTY structures Travel Rule messages, exceptions, cases and evidence for clear compliance reporting and operational review.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
